subject: [N5] 5 action items from Test Leadership Sync
body:
Hi V,

I extracted 5 action items from your Test Leadership Sync meeting (2025-10-23).
Please review and reply with your approval:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**1. Draft recap document for leadership team (due tomorrow EOD)**
   📅 Tomorrow 10:00am | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting, deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**2. Updated hiring pipeline analysis (due Friday)**
   📅 Sunday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**3. Q4 budget proposal review (due before Friday's board meeting)**
   📅 Sunday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting, deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**4. Product roadmap slides for next All-Hands (due next Monday)**
   📅 Sunday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Product | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**5. Customer feedback synthesis report (due next week)**
   📅 Sunday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**Reply with:**
• "approve all" → Push all to Akiflow
• "approve 1,5" → Push only #1 and #5
• "skip 2" → Don't create #2
• "edit 1: tomorrow 8am, 30m" → Modify then push

Or just reply "approved" and I'll push everything!

—Zo
